functions.name: wyzeapy.utils.pad
documentation:
func to pad cleartext to be multiples of 8-byte blocks.
If you want to encrypt a text message that is not multiples of 8-byte
blocks, the text message must be padded with additional bytes to make the
text message to be multiples of 8-byte blocks.

functions.name: wyzeapy.utils.wyze_encrypt
documentation:
Reimplementation of the Wyze app's encryption mechanism.

The decompiled code can be found here 👇
https://paste.sr.ht/~joshmulliken/e9f67e05c4a774004b226d2ac1f070b6d341cb39

functions.name: wyzeapy.utils.wyze_decrypt
documentation:
Reimplementation of the Wyze app's decryption mechanism.

The decompiled code can be found here 👇
https://paste.sr.ht/~joshmulliken/e9f67e05c4a774004b226d2ac1f070b6d341cb39

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.BRIGHTNESS
documentation: From 0-100

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.COLOR_TEMP
documentation: In Kelvin

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.COLOR

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.COLOR_MODE
documentation: 1 = Basic Color, 2 = White, 3 = Effect Mode

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.DOOR_OPEN
documentation: 0 if the door is closed

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.FLOOD_LIGHT
documentation: Also lamp socket on v3/v4 with lamp socket accessory

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.MOTION_DETECTION
documentation: Current Motion Detection State of the Camera

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.MOTION_DETECTION_TOGGLE
documentation: This toggles Camera Motion Detection On/Off

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.PropertyIDs.WCO_MOTION_DETECTION
documentation: Wyze cam outdoor requires both P1047 and P1029 to be set.  P1029 is set via set_property_list

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.WallSwitchProps.IOT_STATE
documentation: Connection state: connected, disconnected

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.ThermostatProps.IOT_STATE

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.ThermostatProps.FAN_MODE

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.ThermostatProps.TEMPERATURE

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.ThermostatProps.HUMIDITY

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.ThermostatProps.HEAT_SP
documentation: heat stop point

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.types.ThermostatProps.MODE_SYS
documentation: auto, heat, cool

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.update_manager.DeviceUpdater.__init__
documentation:
This function initializes a DeviceUpdater object
\:param service: The WyzeApy service connected to a device
\:param device: A WyzeApy device that needs to be in the update que
\:param update_interval: How many seconds should be targeted between updates. Note this value may shift based on 1 call per sec and load.

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.services.update_manager.DeviceUpdater.device
documentation: The device that will be updated

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.services.update_manager.DeviceUpdater.update_in
documentation: A countdown to zero that will tell the priority queue that it is time to update this device

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.services.update_manager.DeviceUpdater.updates_per_interval
documentation: The number of updates that should happen every 5 minutes

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.update_manager.UpdateManager.update_next
documentation: This function should be called once every second

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.services.update_manager.UpdateManager.mutex
documentation: Create a lock object as a class variable

classes.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.create
documentation:
Creates the Wyzeapy class in an async way. Although this is not currently utilized

```
return

An instance of the Wyzeapy class
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.login
documentation:
Logs the user in and retrieves the users token

```
param email

Users email

param password

Users password

param key_id

Key ID for third-party API access

param api_key

API Key for third-party API access

param token

Users existing token from a previous session

raises

TwoFactorAuthenticationEnabled: indicates that the account has 2fa enabled
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.login_with_2fa
documentation:
Logs the user in and retrieves the users token

```
param verification_code

Users 2fa verification code
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.execute_token_callbacks
documentation:
Sends the token to the registered callback functions.

```
param token

Users token object
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.register_for_token_callback
documentation:
Register a callback to be called whenever the user's token is modified

```
param callback_function

A callback function which expects a token object
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.unregister_for_token_callback
documentation:
Register a callback to be called whenever the user's token is modified

```
param callback_function

A callback function which expects a token object
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.unique_device_ids
documentation:
Returns a list of all device ids known to the server
\:return: A set containing the unique device ids

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.notifications_are_on
documentation:
Reports the status of the notifications

```
return

True if the notifications are enabled
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.enable_notifications
documentation: Enables notifications on the account

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.disable_notifications
documentation: Disables notifications on the account

methods.name: wyzeapy.Wyzeapy.valid_login
documentation:
Checks to see if a username and password return a valid login

```
param email

The users email

param password

The users password

param key_id

Key ID for third-party API access

param api_key

API Key for third-party API access

return

True if the account can connect
```

to the first property but it doesnt hurt to set both

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService.get_object_list
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/home_page/get_object_list endpoint

```
return

List of devices
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._get_property_list
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/device/get_property_list endpoint

```
param device

Device to get properties for

return

List of PropertyIDs and values
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._set_property_list
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/device/set_property_list endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to set the property(ies)

param plist

A list of properties [{"pid": pid, "pvalue": pvalue},...]

return

```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._run_action_list
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/auto/run_action_list endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to run the action list

param plist

A list of properties [{"pid": pid, "pvalue": pvalue},...]
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._get_event_list
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/device/get_event_list endpoint

```
param count

Number of events to gather

return

Response from the server
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._run_action
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/auto/run_action endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to run the action

param action

The action to run

return

```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._run_action_devicemgmt
documentation:
Wraps the devicemgmt-service-beta.wyze.com/device-management/api/action/run_action endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to run the action

param state

on or off

return

```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._set_toggle
documentation:
Wraps the ai-subscription-service-beta.wyzecam.com/v4/subscription-service/toggle-management endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to get the state

param toggleType

Enum for the toggle type

param state

String state to set for the toggle
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._get_iot_prop_devicemgmt
documentation:
Wraps the devicemgmt-service-beta.wyze.com/device-management/api/device-property/get_iot_prop endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to get the state

return

```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._set_property
documentation:
Wraps the api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/device/set_property endpoint

```
param device

The device for which to set the property

param pid

The property id

param pvalue

The property value
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._monitoring_profile_active
documentation:
Wraps the hms.api.wyze.com/api/v1/monitoring/v1/profile/active endpoint

```
param hms_id

The hms id

param home

1 for home 0 for not

param away

1 for away 0 for not

return

```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._get_plan_binding_list_by_user
documentation:
Wraps the wyze-membership-service.wyzecam.com/platform/v2/membership/get_plan_binding_list_by_user endpoint

```
return

The response to gathering the plan for the current user
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._disable_reme_alarm
documentation:
Wraps the hms.api.wyze.com/api/v1/reme-alarm endpoint

```
param hms_id

The hms_id for the account
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._monitoring_profile_state_status
documentation:
Wraps the hms.api.wyze.com/api/v1/monitoring/v1/profile/state-status endpoint

```
param hms_id

The hms_id

return

The response that includes the status
```

methods.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._get_plug_history
documentation: Wraps the https://api.wyzecam.com/app/v2/plug/usage_record_list endpoint

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._last_updated_time
documentation: preload a value of 0 so that comparison will succeed on the first run

class_variables.name: wyzeapy.services.base_service.BaseService._min_update_time
documentation: lets let the device_params update every 20 minutes for now. This could probably reduced signicficantly.
